patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD/PLATINUM prevention) validated 7+ times in archive; every instance of negative-edge GOLD staked has produced a direction loss or negative-EV outcome — enforce without exception regardless of F-signal strength.

Three-signal GOLD bar (F-signal fire + positive edge > 4pp + f5_full_delta < 0.15 + no stacked flags) now 4-for-5; the sole loss was a one-run variance game. Bar remains the gold standard for CONFIRM at GOLD tier.
PLATINUM tier with model_prob > 0.85 + f5_full_delta > 0.20 is a calibration artifact — validated 3-for-3 in archive as automatic SKIP; no F-signal overrides this.

Misiorowski (MIL) was a rookie blindspot in early May (05-08 NYY loss); by 05-19 he has accumulated Statcast data and model correctly penalizes CHC's F5 (17.27%), though market still prices CHC at 61.75% full-game — negative edge correctly signals model uncertainty.
CHW @ SEA PENDING is a pipeline timing artifact: Bryce Miller (SEA) confirmed via statsapi as a 3-year MLB veteran with extensive Statcast data — next workflow run should score this game cleanly.

Three-signal GOLD bar cleanly met: F1_xera_gap=1.64* backed by F3=1751.9 (HARD CAP 5 satisfied), edge=+14.02pp, f5_full_delta=0.0499. SP edge and PQI both confirm CLE (Δ=-15.3). CLE 27-22 vs DET 20-28 — meaningful quality gap. No stacked flags. fair_prob=0.409 (<0.42 floor) correctly prevents staking via pipeline rule, but directional conviction is A-grade. Direction sound; stake exclusion is process-correct.
